case_title: BAY MEDIA FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS MEER, KAISER

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MEER, KAISER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY BAY MEDIA FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT MEER, KAISER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-18-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-17-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST; IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUE FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS AND PUT ON FOR DISMISSAL.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO KAISER MEER RETURNED--ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-17-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-15-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR DISMISSAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY MEDIA FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEER, KAISER $376.45 PRINCIPAL, $62.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $438.45, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-26-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-18-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
